_file_role: Benchmark inventory for Fe4S4(SCH3)4 Chan-reference data currently recoverable from local literature and reference assets.
_comment: Unlike Fe2S2 in Chan 2026, the local Fe4S4 reference currently provides FCIDUMP and figure-based benchmark information rather than a clean table of absolute energies and observables. This file records what is directly extractable and what remains unavailable without figure digitization or additional source material.

source.paper: 2017-Spin-Projected Matrix Product States: Versatile Tool for Strongly Correlated Systems

directly_extractable_benchmark_info.interpretation: 24 physically meaningful broken-symmetry initial guesses formed by placing spin-up/down Fe(II) and spin-up/down Fe(III) among four iron sites.

available_observables: spin-spin correlation patterns among the four irons for all 24 converged states
relative energies of the 24 converged SP-MPS states
spmps_smallD.energy_reference: relative to the lowest SP-MPS energy (the 5th state)

sa_mps_check.purpose: used in the paper to verify that the low-energy spin-spin correlation pattern identified by SP-MPS(D=200) matches the larger-D spin-adapted result for the lowest two states

directly_extractable_benchmark_info.qualitative_conclusion: The 24 converged SP-MPS states cluster into three distinct spin-spin correlation patterns; the blue-bar pattern in Figure 10(b) corresponds to the lowest-energy manifold and matches the larger-D SA-MPS ground-state pattern.

notes: The local PDF text gives qualitative description of Figure 10 but does not provide a tabulated numeric list of the 24 relative energies.
Reliable recovery of the 24 relative-energy bars would require figure digitization or an auxiliary numeric source.
